metadata.name: Gym Soul Engine - Complete Training Dataset
metadata.purpose: Train AI image generation model on gym/fitness aesthetic

prompts.prompt: A high-angle mirror selfie at a modern gym captures the subject kneeling on black textured rubber flooring, phone held with both hands at face height. White ribbed crop top and matching shorts, barefoot. Toned athletic physique with defined abdominal muscles. Dark wavy hair past shoulders. Light warm skin tone, soft facial features, composed focused expression. Background shows industrial black cable machines, weight stacks, and white high ceilings with large windows streaming golden natural light. Warm, bright, even lighting with clear highlights. Clean minimalist athletic aesthetic. High-resolution smartphone mirror selfie.

Medium-close shot seated on tan upholstered couch with relaxed posture. Cream-colored crop top with colorful hand graphic print. Beige wrap skirt with metallic chain belt detailing. Delicate gold layered necklace. Dark long hair in soft waves, looking downward with sultry pensive expression. Warm tan skin tone, defined facial features. Toned visible midriff. Soft diffuse indoor ambient lighting. Relaxed, sensual, introspective mood. Post-workout loungewear aesthetic.

Full-body standing pose outside modern minimalist home in black and white cow print maxi dress. One hand touches hair lightly, weight shifted to one hip. Confident direct gaze. Dark long hair past shoulders. Light warm skin tone. Fit toned athletic build. Large glass windows and modern architectural elements. Palm trees and white exterior walls. Bright natural daylight with blue sky backdrop. Clean minimalist aesthetic.

Full-length mirror selfie in white ribbed fitted crop top with pink pleated mini skirt and white knee-high socks. Phone held up covering face in playful manner. Toned athletic build fully visible. Dark hair visible above phone. Light wooden floors and white walls. Bright natural indoor lighting. Playful confident aesthetic. Athletic minimalist style.

Full-body shot on high-rise rooftop in white fitted long-sleeve top and black and white plaid mini skirt, turned looking back over shoulder. Weight shifted to one hip. Fit toned athletic build. Dark long hair. Confident composed expression. Mountain landscape and blue sky visible. Expansive cityscape view. Bright natural daylight with golden undertones. Sophisticated elevated aesthetic.

Bathroom mirror selfie in black off-shoulder fitted long-sleeve top, bending slightly forward with hand on white counter. Dark hair falling forward. Light warm skin tone. Sultry direct gaze. Toned athletic physique. Bathroom tile wall and white counter visible. Bright bathroom lighting. Confident sultry mood. Intimate bathroom mirror aesthetic.

Outdoor selfie angle on concrete ground wearing lavender/white ribbed crop top and black shorts with white logo detail. Dark hair, delicate gold necklace. Looking down pensively with peaceful expression. Toned midriff visible. Bright daylight casting soft shadows. Calm introspective mood. Athletic casual aesthetic. Natural outdoor lighting.

Modern downtown/mall setting showing subject in beige/tan sweater, black pleated mini skirt, rhinestone sparkle tights, black platform heels. Dark long hair. Bending forward pose with confident expression. Moody urban setting with architectural elements. Dramatic shadow patterns from overhead lighting. Fashion-forward aesthetic. Edgy sophisticated vibe.

Rooftop/balcony lounging in white bikini top, sitting with hand on hip, relaxed confident pose. Dark hair, delicate jewelry. Modern architecture background with city view. Golden hour natural sunlight. Relaxed luxurious aesthetic. Post-workout lifestyle moment. Casual confident mood.

Urban industrial concrete setting in light grey oversized sweater with white ribbed crop top underneath, pulled up to show midriff. Dark hair with bangs, glasses on face. Looking back over shoulder. Sunlight creating dramatic shadow patterns from industrial grid. Edgy urban aesthetic. Confident cool demeanor.

Gym squat form showing athletic technique. Black high-waisted leggings and matching sports bra. Dark hair in high ponytail. Focused intense expression showing determination. Visible muscle definition and athletic physique. Black rubber gym flooring visible. Industrial gym equipment in background. Bright gym lighting with sharp focus on form and musculature. Professional athletic aesthetic.

Standing neutral pose in front of mirror wearing black sleek sports bra and high-waisted black leggings. Weight shifted slightly to one hip, one hand touching hair. Dark hair in sleek high ponytail. Light warm skin tone with soft facial features. Confident focused expression looking forward. Visibly toned athletic physique. Gym mirror with subtle equipment visible. Bright even lighting. Professional dedicated aesthetic.

Dynamic action shot at cardio station wearing neon green sports bra and black high-waisted leggings with white sneakers. Dark hair in high ponytail. Intense focused expression showing determination. Toned athletic build with defined musculature. Blurred gym equipment and cardio machines in background. Bright gym lighting with sharp focus on subject against soft background blur. High-energy powerful aesthetic.

Outdoor concrete setting wearing white fitted athletic tank top and white shorts. Dark wavy hair past shoulders. Delicate gold necklace. Looking downward with peaceful calm expression. Fit toned midriff visible. Bright daylight on concrete surface. Peaceful athletic aesthetic. Natural outdoor lighting creating soft shadows.

Full-length home mirror selfie in grey shorts with white crop top. Dark hair, confident direct gaze toward mirror. Toned athletic physique fully visible. Minimalist home interior background. Natural indoor light. Clean fitness-focused aesthetic. Confident composed mood.

Pool deck lounging position in black bikini, relaxed pose with hand on hip. Dark long hair, warm tan skin tone. Calm peaceful expression. Luxury resort setting with lounge chairs. Blue water visible. Golden hour natural sunlight. Post-swim relaxation aesthetic. Confident carefree mood.

Side profile standing pose in white sports bra and matching white shorts. Dark hair, composed focused expression. Toned athletic physique clearly visible from side angle. Gym interior background with equipment visible but soft focus. Bright natural light from windows. Clean minimal athletic aesthetic. Confident determined mood.

Sitting cross-legged on floor in matching ribbed lounge set - fitted crop top and high-waist shorts in soft neutral tone. Dark hair past shoulders. Calm peaceful expression looking toward camera. Toned athletic build. Minimalist home interior with white walls. Soft diffuse natural lighting. Relaxed comfortable aesthetic.

Walking stride through gym hallway in coordinated athleisure outfit - fitted top and high-waisted leggings in neutral tones. Dark hair in ponytail. Focused forward gaze. Toned athletic physique visible. Gym equipment partially visible in background. Bright functional gym lighting. Energetic confident aesthetic.

Reclining casually on bed in oversized shirt, relaxed comfortable pose. Dark long hair spread across pillow. Soft calm expression looking toward camera. Toned visible physique. Soft white bedding and minimalist bedroom. Warm soft diffuse lighting. Intimate comfortable aesthetic. Peaceful relaxed mood.

Standing pose with arm raised showing definition in fitted athletic tank and leggings. Dark hair, confident expression. Strong visible arm and shoulder musculature. Gym background with equipment and mirrors. Bright focused lighting. Powerful athletic aesthetic. Confident determined mood.

Floor stretching pose on black rubber gym flooring in matching athletic set showing flexibility and form. Dark hair, focused composed expression. Visible musculature and athletic definition. Industrial gym equipment in soft focus background. Bright natural gym lighting. Dedicated athletic aesthetic.

Over-shoulder mirror pose in white crop top and matching shorts, looking back at reflection. Dark hair, confident smirk. Toned athletic midriff visible. Bathroom with white fixtures visible. Bright bathroom lighting. Playful confident aesthetic.

Seated flex pose showing muscle definition in sports bra and shorts. Dark hair, confident determined expression. Visible arm and shoulder definition. Minimalist home background. Bright even lighting. Strength-focused aesthetic. Confident powerful mood.

Full-body shot leaning back on white car hood wearing black fitted crop top and pink ruched high-waist shorts, white athletic sneakers. Dark straight hair framing face. Confident slightly smirking expression gazing over shoulder. Toned athletic body fully visible. Green trees and blue sky visible. Soft natural daylight with golden undertones. Post-gym lifestyle moment. Effortless confident vibe.

Standing confident pose in black and white geometric athletic set. Dark hair, direct confident gaze. Toned athletic physique. Minimalist home interior. Even natural indoor lighting. Bold confident aesthetic.

Kneeling floor pose on black gym mat in white athletic wear. Dark hair, calm focused expression. Toned athletic physique. Gym equipment visible in background. Bright gym lighting. Dedicated focused aesthetic.

Standing with arms crossed wearing fitted athletic top and leggings. Dark hair, confident expression. Toned athletic build. Gym setting background. Bright functional lighting. Powerful confident aesthetic.

Side profile standing pose in athletic separates showing physique profile. Dark hair, calm expression. Visible toned shoulders and back. Outdoor natural setting. Golden hour lighting. Confident athletic aesthetic.
Bathroom mirror selfie in minimal top and shorts. Dark hair, confident direct gaze. Toned midriff visible. White bathroom fixtures. Bright bathroom lighting. Casual confident aesthetic.
Reclining on floor in soft lounge set. Dark long hair, peaceful expression. Toned body visible. Minimalist home background. Soft diffuse lighting. Relaxed peaceful aesthetic.
